title: Evolução
description: Experience the growth of a community. Evolve with us in a live experience.
body:
![mainalvorecer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61252fe10a7abbaffaa59aff03e2957611ec73fc.png)










> 
> # **EVOLVING WITH US**

Everyone had that situation where your friends dont wanna play a modpack anymore after some days right? 

 

Well, here is the solution:

 

This modpack relays on a weekly/biweekly updates system that will bring that discovering, expectating and surprising feeling while playing the greatest game ever. The updates will be "themed" and themes will be choosen by community voting.

 

 

We, from electricmonkeys are very excited to bring this idea to reality and make it work. 



Grow, Evolve, and have fun!

 

 

**if not playing in sync with the project, we recommend start your game in the first version, and then every week update it manually to the sequential next version.**






> ## MAIN MODS





**__We DO NOT recommend looking at the main mods of each update, since it kills half of the modpack idea. Do it in your own terms.__**

**its the main mods, the updates have a lot more additions.**
